caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white collared shirt, a dark vest with light-colored embroidery, and a red decorative element at the chest, stands behind a microphone and plays an acoustic guitar. He is positioned in front of a light-colored wooden slatted wall. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, including individuals with blonde and white hair, suggesting an audience. The word "ORCA" appears in white capital letters within a purple speech-bubble graphic on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man continues to sing and play his guitar, with slight changes in his facial expression and the movement of his hands on the instrument. The audience remains stationary in the foreground, and the overall setting and camera angle remain constant.
